3255170.name: Dream Doctor
3255170.description:
You are (or at least try to be) a psychologist with a magic key, capable of entering people's dreams!

Do what anyone would do, be a hero PROFIT with your new ability!

Defeat Bosses

Invite clients to your office and enter their minds to defeat nightmares inside their heads, to receive SPECIAL ITEMS, equippable keychains!

Equip Items to help you

Items with high sentimental value will turn into effects that change the way you face nightmares. Like brooches, toys, or common everyday items. Clients can give one or more gifts based on how WELL DONE your work was!

Passive Items that guarantee effects like increased strength, agility, and health.

Magical Items that grant you new abilities to use at will against your enemies. Like spinning attacks, charges, or... an umbrella?

Fight your own way!

Equip various types of items to create unique and efficient fighting styles based on what you like the most!

Confront nightmares in the order and manner you want! And don't be afraid to give up and try a different nightmare!
3255170.supported_languages: 英语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西
